text.content:
=== APPLICATION Q&A ===

Q1: Experience leading global GTM (100+)
A: 10+ years scaling RevOps, drove 3x growth at Penbrothers. Built global GTM teams, mentored 250+ startups. Comfortable across time zones.

Q2: HubSpot experience
A: Implemented HubSpot from ground up at Penbrothers. Built automated sequences, CRM hygiene, lead scoring workflows, pipeline management.

Q3: Forecasting approach
A: Data-first. Built forecasting model at Penbrothers driving 3x growth. Advanced Excel + BI tools. "If you can't measure it, you can't improve it."

Q4: Why Eftsure?
A: Scaling from regional to global, fighting real cybercrime, mission matters. Want to build revenue engine for IPO-level growth. Based Tokyo (AU timezone OK).

Q5: Salary
A: Market rate $180-250K AUD depending on equity/benefits.

Q6: Notice period
A: 2 weeks.

Q7: Visa/Location
A: Portuguese citizen, no visa needed. Based Tokyo. Happy hybrid Sydney as needed.
